title: Manufacturing Engineer - Shree Cement Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Shree Cement Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Shree Cement Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Shree Cement Ventures Solutions:
Shree Cement Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
